subsections.description: Designed a system for signing, verifying, encrypting & decrypting emails without storing decryption or signing keys on a central server.
Implemented a live visual editor for 3d interactive scenarios in the browser.
Architected and built a system allowing creation of individual tasks with independent dependencies in browser, and automatically generating the back end.

Build a proof-of-concept peer-to-peer video conferencing system supporting 18 simultaneous video clients without a media server - doubling the leading-at-the-time peer-to-peer system, and more than quadrupling the normal limit of 3-4 clients.
Architected a scalable, cloud-based back end with multi-tenancy - replacing the original VM-per-customer system.

subsections.title: Subject Matter Expert - McMaster Continuing Education
subsections.description: Designing and writing a course on backend development for McMaster's Full-Stack Development program.

subsections.title: Stealth Contract
subsections.description: Built a tool for generating a complex, interactive site using a Figma design and CSV data directly from the browser - allowing the client to easily update content without developer input. Collaborated to add features easing their workflow and improving the end-user experience on the generated site.

subsections.title: SafeApp (getsafeapp.com)
subsections.description: Designed, architected and built a chrome extension for signing & encrypting Gmail emails, along with the back-end services on Firebase. Provided guidance and support to an additional developer who joined near the end of my contract, to allow them to take over the project.

subsections.title: Harvard Business School
subsections.description: Built a visual tool for generating input data used by the an earthquake cycle imaging system. Collaborated with the researchers to create a tool that eases their workflow, and set up infurstructure and documentation to allow them to continue maintaining it reliably.

subsections.title: Emile Technologies
subsections.description: Migrated their chatbot from a discontinued service to Firebase, re-implementing many of it's features, while mentoring the client to allow them to continue maintenance independently.

Architected & Built an interactive, browser-based editor for complex game-like assessments. Created an engine for generating Vue components & backend logic from the editor's JSON output. Improved communication between Javascript & Unity - allowing the designer's logic to directly control the 3D visuals. Designed a server system that can be controlled by the visual editor - allowing for logic to run in-browser during editing, and on the server when deployed with no additional engineering. Assisted in the implementation of legacy assessments when necessary. Implemented LSP support & typing for designer-provided variables to allow for the use of typescript in the editor. Build a web-component based wrapper for isolated, independently deployable tasks running through configurable page with a single server connection.

Saved the business ~50k by removing the need for a developer implementing PSD designs for our website by finding an opportunity to create a custom CMS allowing the graphic designer to update the site directly. Migrated our build tools from Grunt to Gulp. Assisted in migrating VMs to LXD containers, and created scripts to provision and update containers. Lead back-end feature development, deployment processes and crash recovery. Developed a graph-based phone IVR system. Migrated from a Freeswitch + Lua based Voip/Video Conferencing server to a containerized, scalable system based on Kurento & NodeJS.

subsections.title: Select Libraries & Tools
